name: axon
description: Universal CI/CD scaffold for GitHub Actions and GitLab CI

scripts.test: echo "Replace this with your test command (jest, vitest, mocha, etc.)" && exit 0
scripts.dev: echo "Replace this with your dev server command (node, nodemon, ts-node, etc.)" && exit 0
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && printf 'console.log("axon v1.0.0 - replace this with your application");\n' > dist/server.js
